<!-- Use this file to provide workspace-specific custom instructions to Copilot. For more details, visit https://code.visualstudio.com/docs/copilot/copilot-customization#_use-a-githubcopilotinstructionsmd-file -->

Project context: Fullstack cricket insights app. Prefer FastAPI patterns, Pydantic models, polars/pandas for data, and React + TS + Tailwind on frontend. Keep code modular: providers -> services -> routers. Avoid scraping protected sites; use Cricsheet data and provider abstractions.
